# 🚀 Pull Request

## 📌 Description

Provide a clear and concise description of what this PR does.

---

## 🧠 Type of Change

Please select the type of change:

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test Update
- [ ] Performance Improvement

---

## 🔄 Related Issue

If this PR fixes an issue, mention it here:

Closes #

---

## 🧪 Testing

Describe the testing done:

- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Backend endpoints verified
- [ ] Frontend build successful
- [ ] Voice input tested (if applicable)
- [ ] No console errors

---

## 📋 Checklist

Before requesting review, confirm:

- [ ] Code follows project standards
- [ ] No sensitive data included
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Tests added (if required)
- [ ] No breaking API changes

---

## 📸 Screenshots (If UI Changes)

Attach screenshots here if applicable.

---

## 🏥 Medical Safety Confirmation (If Applicable)

- [ ] No unsafe medical advice introduced
- [ ] Urgency logic verified
- [ ] Emergency detection unaffected

---

Thank you for contributing to Arovia 🚑
